user_message: [AUTOMATION TRIGGER] Daily automation: Calendar event with non-Microsoft external attendee detected. Account: Contoso Ltd.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Angela Doyle <angela.doyle@contosoltd.com>
To: Marcus Williams <marcus.williams@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-09 08:45 EST
Subject: Re: Re: partner engagement Timeline

Just checking in on the partner engagement proposal. Our Director of IT is asking for a status update before the board meeting next week.

---
From: Marcus Williams <marcus.williams@microsoft.com>
To: Angela Doyle <angela.doyle@contosoltd.com>
Date: 2024-02-23 17:06 EST
Subject: URGENT: partner engagement Issue at Contoso Ltd

I wanted to follow up on our conversation about partner engagement. Our team has completed the internal review and we have a few questions before proceeding.

Meeting: partner engagement Discussion - Contoso Ltd
Date: 2024-03-08
Duration: 45 minutes
Attendees: Angela Doyle (Contoso Ltd), Marcus Williams (Microsoft)

[00:01:30] Angela Doyle (Contoso Ltd): Thanks everyone for joining. Let's dive into partner engagement.

[00:07:00] Angela Doyle (Contoso Ltd): Let me add some context -- we've been working on integration complexity and found that the cost projections need to factor in reserved instance pricing for accuracy.

[00:10:00] Marcus Williams (Microsoft): On the partner engagement front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around timeline constraints.

[00:13:00] Marcus Williams (Microsoft): Our director reviewed this and has concerns about stakeholder alignment. Can we address those?

[00:18:00] Marcus Williams (Microsoft): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is data residency.

[00:20:00] Angela Doyle (Contoso Ltd): On the partner engagement front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around partner engagement.

[00:24:00] Marcus Williams (Microsoft): Let me add some context -- we've been working on data residency and found that the current vendor contract has a 90-day exit clause we need to plan around.

[00:27:00] Marcus Williams (Microsoft): On the partner engagement front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around cost optimization.
